name: ChurnStatusMetrics
SQL: CREATE VIEW ChurnStatusMetrics AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_status, satisfaction_score, churn_score, cltv FROM Status_Analysis;

name: DemographicsByStatus
SQL: CREATE VIEW DemographicsByStatus AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_status, Customer_Info.age, Customer_Info.gender, Customer_Info.senior_citizen, Customer_Info.under_30, Customer_Info.partner, Customer_Info.dependents FROM Status_Analysis JOIN Customer_Info ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Customer_Info.customer_id;

name: SatisfactionChurnRelationship
SQL: CREATE VIEW SatisfactionChurnRelationship AS SELECT Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score, Status_Analysis.churn_score, Status_Analysis.cltv, Status_Analysis.customer_status FROM Status_Analysis;

name: CustomerDistributionsGeographically
SQL: CREATE VIEW CustomerDistributionsGeographically AS SELECT Status_Analysis.customer_status, Location_Data.city, Location_Data.zip_code, Location_Data.latitude, Location_Data.longitude FROM Status_Analysis JOIN Location_Data ON Status_Analysis.customer_id = Location_Data.customer_id;

name: ScoreDistributions
SQL: CREATE VIEW ScoreDistributions AS SELECT Status_Analysis.satisfaction_score AS score_value, 'satisfaction_score' AS score_type FROM Status_Analysis UNION ALL SELECT Status_Analysis.churn_score AS score_value, 'churn_score' AS score_type FROM Status_Analysis;
